title: MCA annual report and accounts 2023 to 2024
body: "This report sets out the activities of the Maritime and Coastguard Agency (MCA) between 1 April 2023 and 31 March 2024.  It provides detailed information on:   our strategy and achievements over the period our performance against key performance indicators our governance arrangements   The financial statements provide detailed accounting and expenditure information for the financial year. "
